name: python3-pyppeteer
title: python3-pyppeteer
summary: port of puppeteer JavaScript chromium browser automation library (Python 3)
description:
port of puppeteer JavaScript chromium browser automation library (Python 3)
This package contains an unofficial Python port of puppeteer javascript
(headless) chrome/chromium browser automation library.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

When you need a concrete invocation, run `pyppeteer-install [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pyppeteer-install.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pyppeteer-install with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pyppeteer-install --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
